spacing_and_layout.general: Use generous padding. Sections should have py-24 or py-32.
spacing_and_layout.hero_layout: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 items-center. Left side text (col-span-12 lg:col-span-7), right side image (col-span-12 lg:col-span-5).
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: For the Problem Section, use a 3-column grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6). Cards must have pure white background, 1px border-slate-200, p-8, rounded-2xl.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons must have explicit hover states (e.g., hover:scale-105 hover:bg-[#008CBE] transition-all duration-300). Cards should have -translate-y-1 and shadow-lg on hover.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_animations: Use framer-motion for simple fade-in-up on scroll for sections.
motion_and_interactions.header: Sticky glassmorphism header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-slate-100.

components.buttons: Rounded-full for friendly, approachable feel. Primary uses #00A1DE with white text. Accent CTA uses #FAD201 with black text. Include data-testid attributes.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI styling with rounded-xl, 1px border-slate-200, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#00A1DE]/50 focus:border-[#00A1DE].
components.language_switcher: Dropdown menu in top right. Persists selection in localStorage. Options: Kinyarwanda (RW - default), English (EN), French (FR), Swahili (SW).

images.description: African courier outdoors, active delivery scene. Use in Hero section right side, with rounded-3xl corners and subtle shadow.
Confident delivery person holding parcels. Used in the Our Promise section.

hero.badge: 40% discount for your first month (Use accent #FAD201 background)
hero.title: Secure courier delivery in Kigali.
hero.subtitle: Pay with MoMo, Airtel Money, or Cash on Delivery. Track your parcel with a 6-digit code.

problem_section.title: Delivery in Kigali shouldn't feel like a gamble.
cards: Lose time not knowing where it is

promise_section.title: Your time and your packages — that's what we value the most.
promise_section.subtitle: We make sure every parcel arrives on time and safe.

waitlist_section.action: Email Waitlist Signup for Google Sheets

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use framer-motion for smooth entrance animations.
Implement the multi-language logic using a simple React Context or i18next, defaulting to 'rw' (Kinyarwanda).
Create the email waitlist form mimicking a submission to an API endpoint (can just be a mocked fetch call returning success for MVP).
Apply `data-testid` to all CTAs, navigation links, and forms.
In index.css, add the font imports for Cabinet Grotesk and Satoshi.
Never use generic placeholders. Use the provided text, colors, and media URLs exactly.
